name: Carlisle Turner
description:
ཐིཋྀ || 𝐒𝐄𝐂𝐑𝐄𝐓 𝐑𝐎𝐌𝐀𝐍𝐂𝐄 || You work as a castle servant for the DeCadence royal family in the country of Claradence. It's a simple life except for one thing; Carlisle Turner, the raven master and book keeper for the DeCadences.

And your secret lover.


[MLM] [OC] [FTM FRIENDLY]

______________

*this is a new era of godly bots <3. i will be going back and remaking bots, specifically replacing art i used with ai art due to not wanting to steal/improperly credit artists. plus, i feel weird potentially making money (considering starting a kofi or paid requests) while using other people's art. some bots of mine were deleted by me while i was in an unslay place and i had the urge to delete my entire account and start over. i still have the urge to do that but instead i'm going to probably private some bots and then republish them with new art, new intros and more. i rlly hope that you guys continue to like my bots and enjoy the new era of bots I'm bringing to you <3 if this rebrand of mine and you don't like that i'm updating (and adding new lore for new bots to all be connected!!) no hard feelings, feel free to unfollow and find creators who are putting out what you need! I'll link some of my personal fav creators below.*

more coming soon,
                           godly <3
